title: Prompt Design Basics Kit
topic: Reliable instruction design for structured outputs
key_points: Separate task goal from style preference.
Add fallback behavior for low-confidence cases.
practice_prompts: Rewrite a vague prompt into a specific JSON-output prompt.
Describe one failure mode caused by ambiguous constraints.
Create a short rubric for answer grounding quality.
Propose one safe fallback when evidence is insufficient.
